description_long: This modern bungalow features a boxy, geometric design with clean white exterior walls and wooden accents. The structure includes a spacious rooftop terrace furnished with an umbrella, lounge chairs, and a table, accessible via an exterior staircase. The front facade showcases a driveway leading to a garage, a small balcony with seating, and a landscaped garden with shrubs and trees. Large windows and open spaces under the upper floor provide shaded outdoor seating areas supported by wooden columns. The building is surrounded by paved walkways and green lawns, enhancing its urban residential appeal. The overall design emphasizes open-air living and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, boxy white bungalow with a rooftop terrace, wooden accents, landscaped garden, and open outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open shaded seating area beneath the upper floor, exterior staircase, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rooftop terrace with umbrella and lounge chairs, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rooftop terrace, curved outdoor seating, and the start of the garden and driveway.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, garage, balcony, landscaped garden, and visible rooftop terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
